body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

A lot has changed in the market — but there are still some incredible homes waiting for the right buyer.

Take a peek at what’s new:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

If something catches your eye, I can give you the inside scoop before it’s gone.
subject: Re: Your dream home might still be out there 🏡
